content:
Could you guys direct any feedback to these concerns below? Thank you so much!
1. How can I add the constraint of n>0 as a comment to the input.
(ex. n=int(input()) # 0<n≤20)
2. Should my WRITE statement just be something like "write answer," or is the one I have okay?
3. BIG ONE: Try to solve this clash (without copying my solution). If I were to assume, the pattern is probably easily recognizable, but the programming might take a while. Did it take you less than 15 minutes? Could you even solve it? I just want to make sure this puzzle is novice-medium difficulty.
4. If there is anything else that I am missing (like edge test cases), feel free to point it out!
